problem id: c4a6d52b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND SHL(5)) XOR ROT(5)

examples:
  01010100 -> 10001010
  10100001 -> 00110100
  11111011 -> 01011111
  01001101 -> 00101001
  11100001 -> 00111100
  00011011 -> 01000011
  01100000 -> 00001100
  01001100 -> 00001001
  01110101 -> 10101110
  01011101 -> 00101011

query: 00010010
predicted answer: 01000010
